zh.lifeSummary: 當Laurence de Sanford於大約1225年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特梅爾波利 桑普福德時，他的父親John de Sanford52歲，母親Alice de Basset46歲。他於1254年與Hawise de Corbet在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1271年之前在英國英格蘭素可維斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sanford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sandford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: Laurence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French form of Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’. Laurentum was a town in Latium, which may have got its name from Latin laurus ‘laurel’, although it is more probably of pre-Roman origin. The given name was moderately popular in the Middle Ages (when it was used for girls as well as boys), under the influence of a 3rd-century saint who was one of the seven deacons of Rome. He was martyred in 258 . The legend is that, having been required to hand over the Church's treasures to the civil authorities, he assembled the poor and sick and presented them. For this act of Christian defiance, he was roasted to death on a gridiron. In England the name is also associated with St Laurence of Canterbury ( d. 619 ). A more recent influence has been the actor Sir Laurence Olivier ( 1907–89 ). See also Lawrence .

en.lifeSummary: When Laurence de Sanford was born about 1225, in Melbury Sampford, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Sanford, was 52 and his mother, Alice de Basset, was 46. He married Hawise de Corbet in 1254, in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 1271, in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Hawise de Corbet en 1254, à Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1271, à Wiston, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Laurence de Sanfordが約1225年にイギリスイギリスドールセトメルブリー サンプフォードで生まれた時，父John de Sanfordは52歳，母Alice de Bassetは46歳であった。1254年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアチャッドエスリー コルベットでHawise de Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1271年以前にイギリスイギリススセックスウィストンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Laurence de Sanford(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 멜버이 샘p퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Sanford(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Basset(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1254년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 채데슬리 코벳에서 Hawise de Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 와이스턴에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Laurence de Sanford родился около 1225 г. в местности мелбури сэмпфорд, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Sanford было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Basset, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Corbet в 1254 г. в местности чэддесли корбетт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1271 г. в местности вистон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
